purpose: Adaptive curriculum routing rules for CEFR courses and early structured literacy pathway
productive_skill_note: Speaking and writing require rubric evidence in addition to quiz scores.

rules.trigger: module diagnostic or activity score below threshold
rules.action: assign remediation mini-lesson and repeat skill check
rules.extension_action: unlock challenge task and portfolio evidence
